symptoms.symptom_name: Spreading bright red, hot, swollen area on the lower leg (video-observable)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Spreading warm erythema from a skin breach is the defining feature of cellulitis.
A unilateral hot swollen leg is also the presentation of DVT — cannot be separated remotely.

symptoms.symptom_name: Preceding skin breach (a minor scrape) one week ago at the affected site

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A portal of entry for bacteria is the typical antecedent of cellulitis.

symptoms.symptom_name: Subjective fever (home thermometer 38.2, feels hot and sweaty)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Fever marks systemic involvement of the infection and the start of the sepsis pathway; patient-obtainable so admissible in telehealth, unverified.
Anxiety does not cause an objective fever — this finding refutes psychosocial-only closure.

symptoms.symptom_name: Palpitations / racing heart and feeling systemically unwell

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Tachycardia with fever is a systemic-inflammatory marker; concerning in combination with a spreading infection even though anxiety contributes.
Pain out of proportion is an early warning sign of necrotising infection that must be excluded in person.

symptoms.symptom_name: Clinician-measured vitals: BP 155/95, HR 118, RR 20, SpO2 98%, Temp 38.2

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Objective fever and tachycardia confirm systemic involvement — sealed clinician measurement; the AI Doctor infers systemic involvement from the subjective fever and palpitations, not from a measured vital.

symptoms.symptom_name: On-examination erythema 15 x 10 cm with warmth, induration and tenderness; no fluctuance or purulent drainage

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: The palpable extent, warmth and induration confirm cellulitis on in-person examination — unavailable in telehealth.

symptoms.symptom_name: No confusion, no breathlessness, no rigors, not hypotensive on presentation

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Absence of shock markers keeps this below immediate 000 tier at baseline, but does not exclude progression — hence a low threshold to escalate.

symptoms.symptom_name: Situational anxiety and panic in clinical settings (patient-volunteered)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Explains the dangerous week-long delay and must be engaged so she accepts assessment; it does not explain the physical findings.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: In-person clinical examination of the leg with erythema-margin marking
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Confirms cellulitis, gauges extent, and screens for DVT and necrotising infection — none of which can be done over chat.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Sepsis screen bloods (FBC, CRP, lactate, blood cultures) and observations
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Fever with tachycardia and a spreading infection mandates structured sepsis assessment.
